title: Alias resolution and structuralChildIndex in Node/TreeCursor
description: Implement proper alias resolution in nodeFromChildSubtree (tree.go) by tracking child index and looking up alias_sequences for the production. Also compute structuralChildIndex in TreeCursorEntry so that field_map lookups using structural child indices work correctly. These two changes are interdependent. Required before GLR parser integration tests that exercise aliased grammars.
